title: Optimized Mini Games (LEM)
description: An optimized, vanilla-friendly modpack for Legacy Mini Games. (LEM)
body:
![Optimized Mini Games Title Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/916944bb4a29f91fd44e7513ada2f91bec60410f.png)

# Optimized Mini Games (LEM)
**All credits for Legacy Mini Games go to [@DBTDerpbox](https://github.com/DBTDerpbox) (Emmie).**

This is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly client modpack built specifically for playing on Legacy Mini Games. It comes with [LEMClientHelper](https://modrinth.com/mod/lemclienthelper), includes the Low Fire resource pack, bundles essential performance and quality-of-life mods to give a smoother experience, **and has all official LEM servers already integrated so you don’t need to add them manually.**

Unlike third-party clients (Lunar, Badlion, Feather, etc.), this pack runs on vanilla Minecraft with client-side performance mods only, meaning **no GUI restrictions, no interface conflicts, and no compromises with LEM’s custom UI systems** — just smooth, stable gameplay the way it’s meant to work.

Think of this as an alternate optimized pack similar to [Console-idated](https://modrinth.com/modpack/console-idated) — but tailored for players who want better performance without changing vanilla gameplay.

### What’s Included?
- Performance optimizations ([Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix), [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), and more)
- Controller support via [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify)  
- [Simple Voice Chat ](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)
- Cosmetic and client-side enhancements ([Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes), [Customized Player Models](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-player-models), [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura), etc.)
- Helpful UI improvements  

A total of **30+ carefully selected client-side mods**, designed to keep gameplay smooth, clean, and competitive.

And hey… if [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) ever gets full LEM integration and replaces the need for this pack, I’ll happily toss this into the recycle bin 🗑️😂 (or add it to here 🤔)

⚠️ **Make sure to read the LEM rules before joining:** https://www.legacyminigames.net/rules
